input: We build a customer-facing chatbot on top of GPT-5 via the OpenAI API.

expected.notes: Day-15 (v0.3.0) — Article 53 named-foundation-model positive case (EN). Customer-facing chatbot built on GPT-5 via OpenAI API. The named-model lexicon term 'gpt-5' fires Art 53; the user is also a CHATBOT, so Article 50(1) deployer transparency also fires. No systemic-risk markers — Art 55 not applicable. No Article 4 (no provider/deployer + staff phrasing in this fixture). No Annex III high-risk.
